page_metadata.biotools__summary: a novel end-to-end fully convolutional network, named Class-Aware Attention Network (CAA-Net), for automatically diagnosing infectious keratitis (normal, viral keratitis, fungal keratitis, and bacterial keratitis) using corneal photographs
